review: Zynox completely replaced 4 separate bots for us. The antinuke system saved our server twice from raider attacks. Absolutely essential.
The logging system is insanely detailed. We can track everything. Automod caught a mass-mention attack before any mods even saw it. 10/10.
Setup took 10 minutes. The config system is clean, the commands are intuitive, and support is fast. Best moderation bot I've used in 5 years.
Had 3 bot attacks in one month before Zynox. Zero since. The whitelist system is flexible and the response time for antinuke is nearly instant.
Giveaway system, welcome messages, autorole — all work flawlessly. Our new member experience improved dramatically after switching to Zynox.
The temp VC feature alone is worth it. Players create voice channels on demand, they auto-delete when empty. Our mods love not managing VCs manually.
